{{Infobox technique
| name = Evolution Engine
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

''See also: [[Evolution Engine Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Evolution Engine is a specialized mechanism integrated into the entity known as [[Starhammer]]. Rather than acting as a simple upgrade system, it functions by drawing upon the [[Aether]] to help the user adapt to specific challenges. When activated, the Engine facilitates growth by discarding unnecessary functions, reinforcing successful ones, and developing entirely new abilities or components that its original creator could not have designed. These changes can include the creation of unique structural elements, such as advanced nervous systems meant to overcome signal speed limitations or new diagnostic tools. [[The Engine]]'s activations are significant enough to cause detectable warps in the [[Aether]], making them noticeable to others in the sector. While it can provide a modest increase to overall system efficiency, its primary purpose is to allow for unpredictable and potentially massive developmental leaps. However, the process carries risks; repeated activations can lead to mental instability in the user, potentially resulting in a psychotic temperament. Because the Engine can alter a subject's physical and functional structure in ways that are difficult to fully comprehend or replicate, it represents a powerful tool for autonomous adaptation.}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Evolution Engine is a device activated by [[Starhammer]] that relies on the [[Aether]] to adapt its subject. During its fifth activation, the engine places significant strain on [[Starhammer]] and can trigger subsequent rounds if he is defeated but remains alive. Designed to develop abilities beyond the reach of its creator, the system increases efficiency and calls upon the [[Aether]] to optimize a subject's mindset for problem-solving, though this process often occurs at the expense of their personality and affects their mind. These activations cause significant changes in [[Starhammer]], potentially improving him, although the engine's process can be halted by a spell.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">13</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer]]'s [[Evolution Engine]] has activated for the fifth time in his [[life]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c16">''The Engineer'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Evolution Engine]] causes strain on [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31">''The Engineer'', chapter 31</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Evolution Engine]] can trigger another round with [[Starhammer]] if he is beaten but not killed.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c34">''The Engineer'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Evolution Engine]] may have improved [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38">''The Engineer'', chapter 38</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Evolution Engine]] is a device being activated by [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Evolution Engine]] calls on the [[Aether]] to adapt a subject.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39">''The Engineer'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Evolution Engine]] increases system efficiency by a few percent and is designed to adapt the user.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Evolution Engine]] is designed to develop abilities that its creator could not build.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Evolution Engine]] affects the mind of its subject.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Evolution Engine]] optimizes the subject's mindset to solve problems at the expense of their personality.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Evolution Engine]]'s activations cause significant changes in [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40">''The Engineer'', chapter 40</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Evolution Engine]] is an [[Aether]]-dependent system.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c47">''The Engineer'', chapter 47</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|A spell can stop [[Starhammer]]'s [[Evolution Engine]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c55">''The Engineer'', chapter 55</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Evolution Engine]] triggers when noticed by everyone in the sector.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8">''The Pilot'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“The Evolution Engine calls on the Aether,” she said with a sigh.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
